destinations.evidence: The primary async fee API requires a mutable ModelCache and passes it into LLM executor fee calculation.
destinations.snippet:
pub fn calculate_async_fees<DB: revm::Database>(..., model_cache: &mut ModelCache) -> Result<AsyncFees, String>
...
compute_llm_executor_fee(db, model_registry_contract, output, is_encrypted, model_cache)?

destinations.evidence: LLM fee pricing obtains model configuration through the cached registry read path.
Payload building creates and reuses a per-block ModelCache for async fee calculation.
Block verification mirrors builder pricing with a per-block ModelCache.

equivalence_argument: The port removed optional/no-cache fee calculation at the builder/verifier call surface: calculate_async_fees requires &mut ModelCache, compute_llm_executor_fee reads model config through read_model_from_db_cached, and both payload construction and block verification pass a per-block cache.
notes: Mapped in fee API, LLM pricing, payload builder, and verifier call sites.
rationale: The diff renames the cached fee function to the primary calculate_async_fees API, changes cache parameters from Option<&mut ModelCache> to &mut ModelCache, removes non-cached wrapper functions, and updates payload building and block verification call sites to pass their model cache directly. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Async fee calculation and LLM executor fee pricing must be called with a mutable per-block ModelCache; model registry reads must check and populate that cache, and there must be no fallback path that silently performs uncached model lookups.
suggested_falsification_tests: Run two LLM fee calculations for the same model in a block using a database mock that counts storage reads. Assert the first call populates ModelCache and the second returns the cached value without an additional model-registry read; also assert call sites fail to compile or tests fail if no ModelCache is supplied.
summary: LLM settlement fee pricing uses a required per-block ModelCache.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Use a database mock counting ModelRegistry reads for two LLM settlements with the same model in one block; the second calculation should hit ModelCache without a second storage read.
title: LLM fee pricing always uses model cache
